title: ⚡🌍 SALES & MARKETING ROLE 🌍
description:
Entry Level | Training Provided | Performance-Based | Uncapped Earnings

Growth • Exposure • Income • Leadership

⚠️ PLEASE READ THIS PROPERLY BEFORE APPLYING

This is not a typical sales job ad.

Most job ads promise:

“Competitive salary”

“Career progression”

“Good environment”

Then reality hits:

Salary barely moves

Promotions are unclear

You feel replaceable

You’re stuck doing repetitive work

👉 This role exists for people who want MORE than average.

🔥 WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

This opportunity is designed for individuals who are:

Fresh graduates unsure where to start

ORD personnel who don’t want to waste their early years

Career switchers stuck in low-growth roles

People who want income growth based on performance, not time

If you value:

Skill development

Income potential

Clear career progression

Personal growth

👉 Then keep reading.

🏢 WHO WE ARE & WHY WE’RE HIRING

We are a fast-growing sales & marketing organisation expanding due to increased demand and new projects.

Our belief is simple:

Your background does not determine your future.

Your attitude, discipline, and effort do.

That’s why we:

Hire entry-level individuals

Provide full training

Promote based on performance

Develop people into leaders

Many of our current managers:

Started with zero experience

Were once fresh grads / ORD

Took a risk instead of choosing comfort

❌ WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

Let’s be very honest.

This is NOT:

A fixed-salary comfort job

A slow-paced office role

A “do minimum, still get paid” position

A job where success is automatic

If you are looking for:

Stability without effort

Guaranteed outcomes

Zero pressure

👉 This role is not suitable.

✅ WHAT THIS ROLE ACTUALLY IS

This role IS:

A performance-driven sales & marketing role

A real-world skill-building platform

A career accelerator

A place where effort = rewards

You are here to:

Learn

Execute

Improve

Grow

📚 WHAT YOU WILL LEARN (REAL VALUE)

Sales is not just about talking.

Sales is about:

Psychology

Communication

Influence

Confidence

Problem-solving

In this role, you will be trained in the following key areas 👇

1️⃣ Communication & Confidence Mastery

You will learn how to:

Speak clearly and confidently

Read people and situations

Build rapport quickly

Ask the right questions

Present ideas persuasively

Handle objections professionally

➡️ These are life skills, not just job skills.

2️⃣ Sales & Marketing Fundamentals

You will be coached step-by-step on:

Understanding customer needs

Product positioning & value selling

Ethical persuasion

Closing techniques

Follow-ups & relationship building

➡️ Skills you can use anywhere in life or business.

3️⃣ Mental Resilience & Discipline

Sales builds:

Emotional control

Consistency under pressure

Confidence through rejection

Strong work ethic

Instead of avoiding challenges, you’ll be trained to:

Stay calm under pressure

Bounce back from rejection

Focus on long-term growth

➡️ This is why many people say sales changes their mindset forever.

4️⃣ Early Leadership Exposure

Unlike traditional jobs where leadership takes years:

Here, you will:

Learn leadership principles early

Be exposed to mentoring & guiding others

Take responsibility faster if you perform

➡️ Leadership is earned, not waited for.

🎓 FULL TRAINING PROVIDED (NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED)

If your concern is:

“I’ve never done sales before”

Good news: We expect that.

We provide:

Structured onboarding

Step-by-step sales training

Daily coaching & mentoring

Clear systems & frameworks

Continuous feedback & improvement

👉 You don’t need experience.

👉 You need commitment and coachability.

💰 INCOME STRUCTURE — PERFORMANCE BASED & UNCAPPED

This is not a fixed-salary role.

How income works:

Performance-based earnings

No income ceiling

High performers earn significantly more

Your income grows as your skills grow

Traditional jobs:

Pay for time

Cap your income

Reward seniority

This role:

Pays for results

Rewards improvement

Gives control back to you

📈 CAREER PROGRESSION — CLEAR & MERIT-BASED

No politics.

No guessing.

No waiting years.

Typical progression path:

Entry Level Sales

Senior Sales

Team Leader

Assistant Manager

Manager

You advance based on:

Performance

Consistency

Leadership ability

➡️ You earn your next level.

✈️ TRAVEL, EXPOSURE & OPPORTUNITIES

High performers may receive:

Local & overseas travel opportunities

Exposure to different markets

Incentive trips

Growth experiences beyond office work

➡️ Travel here is earned, not promised.

🎉 TEAM CULTURE & ENVIRONMENT

You will not be alone.

Our culture includes:

Supportive mentorship

Team nights & bonding

Incentives & recognition

Healthy competition

Growth-focused environment

➡️ You grow faster when surrounded by driven people.

👥 WHO SHOULD APPLY

This role is ideal if you are:

Fresh graduate wanting real skills

ORD personnel ready to build your future

Career switcher seeking growth & income

Hungry, disciplined, and open to learning

🚫 WHO SHOULD NOT APPLY

Do not apply if you:

Want comfort without effort

Avoid accountability

Expect results without work

Dislike performance-based systems

This role is demanding — but rewarding.

🧠 FINAL REALITY CHECK

This role will:

Push you

Challenge you

Test your discipline

But it will also:

Build confidence

Increase earning power

Develop leadership

Open future opportunities

Comfort is easy.

Growth is valuable.

👉 CALL TO ACTION

🔥 If you are serious about growth, income, and exposure:

👉 DM us now or apply today

👉 Limited slots due to training capacity

Stop waiting.

Start building.

postedCompany.description:
We are a business firm that specialises in direct recruiting for global clients from SMEs to MNCs. 


We are looking for professionals in the Sales and Marketing industry.
postedCompany.name: ZEROTHREE PTE. LTD.
